name: dex-agent
summary: Direct DeFi trading on Base chain via Uniswap V3. Zero middleman fees. Self-custodial. Stop-loss, take-profit, price feeds, swap quotes. Bankr alternative for OpenClaw agents.
description: DEX Agent provides direct DEX swap execution on Base chain. Unlike custodial services like Bankr (0.65% fee), DEX Agent executes swaps directly through Uniswap V3 smart contracts with zero platform fees — just gas costs. Includes self-custodial wallet management, real-time price feeds from on-chain data, stop-loss and take-profit orders, multi-RPC failover, and slippage protection.
author: avmw2025
